message:
test(showcase): update mermaid PTY tests and refresh all snapshot baselines

PTY tests (mermaid_showcase_pty.rs):
- Expanded harness validation to check new telemetry fields in JSONL output
  (sample_id, diagram_type, glyph_mode, cache_hit, render_time_ms, etc.).
- New tests for dense flow sample edge types, init directives toggle,
  and link mode switching.

Screen snapshot tests (screen_snapshots.rs):
- New snapshot cases: flow_basic_ascii, flow_basic_links_inline,
  flow_dense_guard_tight, flow_dense_init_directives.

Snapshot baselines:
- All 28 existing .snap files refreshed to reflect rendering changes from
  the canvas point_colored_in_bounds optimization and mermaid showcase
  feature coverage expansion (BT layout, dense flow edges, updated sample
  registry).
- 4 new .snap files for the newly added test cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
